title: BEM-866 sanitize codex runner
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
lines = text.splitlines()
remove_names = [
    'Process workflow dispatch queue before commit',
    'BEM-866 queue step heartbeat',
    'Process workflow dispatch queue via github-script',
    'Process workflow dispatch queue'
]
out = []
i = 0
while i < len(lines):
    line = lines[i]
    if any(('- name: ' + name) in line for name in remove_names):
        indent = len(line) - len(line.lstrip(' '))
        i += 1
        while i < len(lines):
            nxt = lines[i]
            nindent = len(nxt) - len(nxt.lstrip(' '))
            if nxt.lstrip().startswith('- name:') and nindent == indent:
                break
            i += 1
        continue
    if 'BEM-865 inline workflow dispatch queue marker' in line or 'Queue processing is handled after task execution' in line:
        i += 1
        continue
    out.append(line)
    i += 1
p.write_text('\n'.join(out).rstrip() + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CODEX_RUNNER_SANITIZED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 codex-runner sanitized\nStatus: SANITIZED\nRemoved experimental workflow dispatch queue steps from codex-runner. Queue dispatch must be handled by dedicated workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.yml.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(p))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('sanitized codex-runner by removing experimental queue steps')
"""
No issue comments.
